Mr. Live
1. Website is needed for CMC and CoinGecko. That’s a priority.

2. Next is GitHub repository.

3. Next is a roadmap/litepaper.

4. Next is intense marketing once these steps are done: daily AMAs, bull posting, DEX boosting if needed at correct times.

5. More mods in this group is warranted as well.

There is more but this is a start. And my opinion only but I have advised many projects so carries a bit of weight 🤝
👍

Raidar
👋 Welcome to Raidar! 🧭

You’ve just installed the largest raid bot on Telegram, trusted by over 83,000 groups to supercharge their raids! 🚀

Quick Start Guide
1️⃣ /options – Customize Raidar to your group
2️⃣ /raid <link> <targets> – Launch a raid instantly
3️⃣ /stop – Stop an active raid
4️⃣ /next <link> <targets> – Queue up your next raid
5️⃣ /lb – Show current leaderboard
6️⃣ /reward <user> <amount> <symbol> – Send token rewards

Full Command List
DM @raidar and send /list to see every command.

⚠️ Raidar requires admin permissions to function correctly

Happy raiding! 🏹
🔥 Raidar Trending
👑 Raidar Pro
🔼 Trending Boost
🆘 Support
📑 Docs

07:00
Crypto Rug Muncher
Please don’t stress over the low volume this holiday weekend. It’s not just our coin -- a lot of tokens slow down during weekends like this. Best thing we can do is stay active: DCA if you can, buy, hold, and trade $CRM and $cryptorugmunch to keep the volume flowing organically. Continue to spread the word about our project on your socials. Together we’ll keep building and pushing this forward.
